method: SkillOpt-adapted assessment (citation tier triage, no full loop)
assessment: Assessed and triaged OUT: jaar-citation-and-style is already correct and complete on every verifiable citation fact in the source map — in-text author-date (not footnotes), footnotes for substance only, alphabetized year-keyed reference list, the exact (Wolf 1996: 33) / (1995: 45-46) example forms, serial comma, gender-neutral language, italicized foreign words, and the CMOS-15th-edition fallback already hedged as a 待核实 live-check (since CMOS is now in its 18th edition). No verifiable hard-fact gap; editing would be padding. Skill left unchanged.
